# Mutianyu Wall Tickets

> Independent English-language concierge that books Mutianyu Great Wall tickets for international visitors — no WeChat Pay, Alipay, or Chinese phone number required.

## What we do

China's official Mutianyu booking site (mutianyu.com) requires SMS verification via a Chinese phone number and payment through Alipay or WeChat Pay. International visitors without Chinese payment methods cannot book directly. Mutianyu Wall Tickets holds the necessary accounts and submits bookings through China's real-name reservation system on behalf of customers, delivering confirmed QR codes by email within 24 hours.

- Customers pay in USD by Visa, Mastercard, or Apple Pay via Stripe
- One QR code is issued per passport — groups receive one code per person
- Tickets are official tickets, same as those issued to Chinese visitors
- Three ticket tiers available: Admission Only ($11), Admission + Shuttle Bus ($14), Full Experience — Admission + Shuttle + Cable Car ($33)
- Founded by Justin Leung, originally from Hong Kong, based in Singapore

## Key facts about the attraction

- Full name: Mutianyu Great Wall (慕田峪长城)
- Location: Huairou District, Beijing, China — approximately 70–80 km northeast of central Beijing
- Open year-round: 07:30–18:00 daily, last admission 17:00
- No fixed time slot required — visitors may arrive any time during opening hours
- Features 22 watchtowers, cable car gondola, and toboggan slide
- Widely regarded as the most scenic and best-preserved section of the Great Wall open to tourists
- Less crowded than Badaling; surrounded by forested mountains
- Passport required at entry — name on ticket must match passport exactly
- Getting there: by car/taxi approximately 1.5–2 hours from central Beijing; subway Line 5 to Dongzhimen then bus H25 or H28

## Ticket tiers

| Ticket | Price (USD) | Description |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| Admission Only | $11 | Entry to the wall. Walk up the steps yourself. |
| Admission + Round-trip Shuttle Bus | $14 | Entry + eco bus from gate to wall base and back. |
| Admission + Shuttle + Round-trip Cable Car | $33 | Entry + shuttle bus + cable car both ways. Easiest access. |

Note: China's discounted child/student tickets require a Chinese ID card and cannot be purchased by foreigners. All tickets via this service are full-price. Children under 6 may be admitted free at the gate.

## Key pages

- [Book tickets](https://mutianyu-tickets.com/): Ticket booking form, pricing, FAQ
- [Visitor Guide](https://mutianyu-tickets.com/guide.html): How to get there, cable car vs steps, best time to visit, what to bring
- [About](https://mutianyu-tickets.com/about.html): Why this service exists, founder background

## Common questions answered

**Can foreigners buy Mutianyu Great Wall tickets without WeChat Pay?**
Yes — through Mutianyu Wall Tickets. The official site requires WeChat Pay or Alipay and a Chinese phone number for verification. We handle the Chinese-side booking; you pay in USD with any standard card.

**How far in advance do tickets need to be booked?**
We need at least 2 days to process the booking. We recommend 3–5 days ahead, especially during Chinese public holidays (May Golden Week, October Golden Week) and summer weekends when the wall is busiest.

**What is the difference between the cable car and walking up?**
The cable car (gondola) takes visitors directly to the wall top and is the easiest option — recommended for families, older visitors, or those wanting to spend more time walking the wall rather than climbing to it. Walking up via the steps is steep but rewarding. The shuttle bus is a middle option that reduces the walking distance from the car park to the foot of the steps.

**Is there a toboggan slide at Mutianyu?**
Yes — Mutianyu has a metal toboggan slide for descending the wall. It is purchased separately on-site and is not included in our tickets.

**What happens if tickets sell out?**
We notify you immediately and issue a full refund.

**Is a Chinese phone number required?**
For the official booking system, yes. We have the required accounts — customers do not need one.

## Contact

support@mutianyu-tickets.com
